title: Thattayil Orippurathu Bhagavathy Kshetram
tagline: Thattayil Orippurathu Bhagavathy Kshetram — spiritual town of Kerala

overview.short: Orippurathu Bhagavathy Temple (Malayalam: ഒരിപ്പുറത്തു ഭഗവതി ക്ഷേത്രം) is a 1200 year old ancient Hindu temple in Thattayil, near Adoor in Pathanamthitta in Kerala.
overview.description: Orippurathu Bhagavathy Temple (Malayalam: ഒരിപ്പുറത്തു ഭഗവതി ക്ഷേത്രം) is a 1200 year old ancient Hindu temple in Thattayil, near Adoor in Pathanamthitta in Kerala. It is one of the most famous Bhagavathi temples in Central Travancore. The main deity of the temple is Goddess Kali. Sub deities include Lord Ganesha, Lord Krishna, Naga Rajav, Naga Yakshi, Rekshassu, Yogeeshwaran, Yakshi Amma and Madan Swamy.

topPlaces.name: Nariyapuram
topPlaces.description: Nariyapuram is a village in Vallicode Panchayat of Pathanamthitta district in Kerala, India. Nariyapuram is located in the northern part of Pathanamthitta.

topPlaces.name: Kaipattoor
topPlaces.description: Kaipattoor is a small town in Vallicode panchayat of Pathanamthitta district in Kerala, India. Kaipattoor (also spelled Kaippattoor, Kaippattor and Kaippattur) is located in the western part of Pathanamthitta district.

topPlaces.name: St. Mary's Orthodox Syrian Cathedral, Thumpamon
topPlaces.description: St. Mary's Orthodox Syrian Cathedral (Thumpamon Valiya Pally or തുമ്പമണ്‍ വലിയ പള്ളി or Marthamariyam Badrasana Devalayam) is an Orthodox ancient church located in Thumpamon near Pandalam, Kerala state of India.

image.alt: St. Mary's Orthodox Syrian Cathedral, Thumpamon

topPlaces.name: Thumpamon
topPlaces.description: Thumpamon is a village in Pandalam (5 km Approx), a part of Adoor thaluk in Kerala, India. One of the greatest attractions of this village is the Achenkovil River, which is known for its natural sceneries along the riverbank.

topPlaces.name: Parakode
topPlaces.description: Parakode is one of the main junction situated in the outskirts of Adoor Muncipality Pathanamthitta District, Kerala state, India.

topPlaces.name: Adoor
topPlaces.description: Adoor is a municipality in the Pathanamthitta district of Kerala, India. It is the headquarters of the Adoor Taluk and Adoor Revenue Division.

topPlaces.name: Thattayil
topPlaces.description: Thattayil is a village near Pandalam in the Pathanamthitta district, state of Kerala, India.

topPlaces.name: Kaipattoor Bridge
topPlaces.description: Kaipattoor Bridge is a concrete bridge in Pathanamthitta, Kerala that connects Kaipattoor and Omalloor over the Achankovil River.

faq.q: What is the best time to visit Thattayil Orippurathu Bhagavathy Kshetram?
faq.a: The best time to visit Thattayil Orippurathu Bhagavathy Kshetram is Nov – Feb. Summers are 26–36°C and winters are 22–32°C.

faq.q: How do I reach Thattayil Orippurathu Bhagavathy Kshetram?
faq.a: The nearest airport is Thiruvananthapuram International Airport (83 km) and the nearest railway station is Thiruvananthapuram Central (84 km). Roads are generally good; check seasonal/monsoon conditions before high-altitude or remote stretches.

faq.q: How many days are enough for Thattayil Orippurathu Bhagavathy Kshetram?
faq.a: 3 days are usually enough to cover the top attractions of Thattayil Orippurathu Bhagavathy Kshetram at a relaxed pace.

faq.q: How much does a hotel cost in Thattayil Orippurathu Bhagavathy Kshetram?
faq.a: Stays in Thattayil Orippurathu Bhagavathy Kshetram start from ₹900 per night, with options across 4 price categories.

faq.q: What are the top places to visit in Thattayil Orippurathu Bhagavathy Kshetram?
faq.a: The top attractions are Nariyapuram, Kaipattoor, St. Mary's Orthodox Syrian Cathedral, Thumpamon, Thumpamon, Parakode.
